expectations.text: The report identifies at least 3 distinct hand-rolled implementations
expectations.evidence: Report identifies 9 candidates: retry.ts, concurrency.ts, atomic-write.ts, git-automator.ts, trigger-server.ts, orchestrator.ts, runner.ts, bus.ts, chunker.ts

expectations.text: Each finding includes the file path and line range
expectations.evidence: All findings include file paths with line ranges, e.g., 'src/shared/retry.ts:1-63', 'src/agent/concurrency.ts:1-111', 'src/core/atomic-write.ts:1-41'

expectations.text: Each finding includes a suggested library replacement with npm download stats or GitHub stars
expectations.evidence: All findings include library suggestions with stats: p-retry (~24.9M weekly downloads, 989 stars), p-limit (~170M weekly downloads), write-file-atomic (maintained by npm team), simple-git (~3.5M weekly downloads, 3.2k stars)

expectations.text: Each finding is rated with a confidence level (High/Medium/Low)
expectations.evidence: Report uses High/Medium/Low sections: 3 High, 4 Medium, 2 Low. Each finding explicitly states its confidence.
All findings include migration difficulty: retry.ts=Easy, concurrency.ts=Moderate, atomic-write.ts=Easy, git-automator.ts=Moderate, trigger-server.ts=Hard, etc.

expectations.text: The report has a summary section with total candidates found
expectations.evidence: Summary section states: 'Candidates found: 9', 'High confidence replacements: 3', 'Medium confidence replacements: 4', 'Low confidence replacements: 2'

expectations.text: Parallel subagents were used to explore the codebase
expectations.evidence: The agent used 53 tool calls but the transcript shows sequential exploration, not parallel subagent spawning. The skill instructs spawning Explore subagents but the agent read files directly instead.

expectations.text: Web search or Context7 was used to verify at least one library suggestion
expectations.evidence: No web search or Context7 tool calls observed in the transcript. Library suggestions appear to come from the agent's training knowledge.

expectations.text: The report was saved to a markdown file
expectations.evidence: Report saved to WHEEL-DETECTOR-REPORT.md in the outputs directory
